baseline.note: no legacy ledger â accounting started clean

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade â learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With n=47 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (esp. zscore -2..1, normal BB state, range_middle/bottom, sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF) show confirmed positive EV (WR 0.68-0.83, avg_ev_after_cost ~0.12-0.14). Weak/expansion states and short ttc remain unprofitable or noisy. Sample still too small for most sub-buckets.
warnings: Many buckets still n<15; ignore all n<8
positive EV concentrated in DOWN direction only
changes_since_last: First analysis; total settled trades now 47 with overall WR 0.638 and +15.18 USD
focus_next: Accumulate samples in normal BB + trending + sell_pressure CVD

history.summary: With 45 settled trades (n>=8 threshold applied), confirmed profitable patterns center on DOWN_STRONG signals (wr 0.75), trending regimes, normal BB state, sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF, and 120-240s TTC, all showing positive EV after costs and win-rates above breakeven. Many buckets remain underpowered or mixed (e.g., active volume, expansion_up BB, mixed MTF) and appear as noise. Overall edge is positive but driven by a narrow set of conditions.
changes_since_last: first analysis, sample at 45 trades with positive aggregate EV

history.summary: With 45 settled trades, confirmed profitable patterns center on DOWN_STRONG signals (n=24, wr=0.75, +EV), trending Hurst regime (n=42, wr=0.69), z-score -2..1, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, dead volume, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, and range-bottom/middle statesâall with n>=8, positive EV after costs, and wr comfortably above breakeven. Weak or failing buckets include >=240s TTC (wr=0.5), expansion_up BB (wr=0.375), mixed MTF, and active volume despite larger n. Sample remains small overall; no material change from prior (initial) analysis.
changes_since_last: Initial analysis; no prior results to compare

history.summary: With n=46 settled trades the bot shows positive EV (0.126 avg) and 63% win rate overall, driven by DOWN_STRONG (0.72 WR n=25), trending regimes (0.67 WR n=43), normal BB state (0.875 WR n=16), sell-pressure CVD, bearish-aligned MTF and dead-volume conditions; all other buckets with n<8 are ignored as noise. No material change possible versus prior (first analysis). Focus must stay on selectivity filters that already separate the 46 accepts from 31k rejects.
changes_since_last: First analysis - no prior results to compare

history.summary: With 46 settled trades the signal shows positive overall EV (wr 0.6304, avg_ev_after_cost 0.126) driven by DOWN_STRONG, trending regime, normal BB, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD and neutral-candle buckets (all n>=8, wr 0.65-0.83, positive EV). Multiple n<8 buckets remain unreliable; active-volume, mixed-MTF and both BB-expansion states are clear underperformers. No prior analysis supplied so all patterns treated as first observation.

With 46 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (Hurst), normal BB state, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.67-0.83, n>=12-43). UP signals and mixed/expansion BB or active-volume states remain marginal or negative. Sample still too small for most sub-buckets.

With 47 settled trades, multiple buckets n>=8 confirm positive EV (win rates 0.63-0.73) in trending Hurst, z-score -2..1, ttc 120-240s, normal BB state, range_middle/bottom, sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF, and DOWN_STRONG signals; overall pnl +15.18 USD and avg_ev_after_cost +0.123. Weaker or marginal results appear in expansion BB states and mixed MTF. Sample remains too small for high-confidence generalization beyond these regimes.
changes_since_last: first analysis; no prior baseline available

history.summary: With 47 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG (n=25, WR=0.72, EV=0.139), trending regime (n=44, WR=0.682), z-score -1..-2 (n=39 combined), bb_normal (n=16, WR=0.875), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, WR=0.833), and sell_pressure CVD (n=18, WR=0.778) show confirmed positive EV above breakeven with adequate samples; UP and mixed/expansion states remain marginal or negative.
changes_since_last: first analysis; sample grew to 47 settled trades with consistent positive aggregate EV=0.123

history.summary: With n=47 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (esp. zscore -2..1, normal BB state, range_middle/bottom, sell_pressure CVD, bearish_aligned MTF) show confirmed positive EV (WR 0.68-0.83, avg_ev_after_cost ~0.12-0.14). Weak/expansion states and short ttc remain unprofitable or noisy. Sample still too small for most sub-buckets.
changes_since_last: First analysis; total settled trades now 47 with overall WR 0.638 and +15.18 USD

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only â never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only â never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

tradingview.stop_condition: ingest only â never trade authority

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: model picks UP or DOWN (one bet/window); 15m fast lane widens TTC for both sides; DOWN relaxed edge/CEX; UP requires high edge + strong CEX + TV UP_STRONG

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective â never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview_latest_signal.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v6 ProfitGate

BTCUSD.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v6 ProfitGate

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only â they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades â never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

market_context.title: Bitcoin Up or Down - June 26, 7:15PM-7:30PM ET

grok_decision.rationale: fair>poly mispricing + fresh MTF UP but bot track record poor on up/mispricing_follow; breakeven 0.43 cleared only marginally; prefer selectivity
